description: NULLIF on a NOT NULL column still produces nullable result

columns.name: name
columns.note: NULLIF can always return NULL, regardless of input column nullability

name: nullif_on_non_null
query_sql:
-- @name GetNonEmptyName
-- @returns :many
SELECT NULLIF(name, '') AS name FROM users
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
